channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Rep. Fine tells Newsmax Democrats aim to destroy America
item.description: Rep. Randy Fine, R-Fla., said on Newsmax that three democratic socialists who won New York City primaries are part of a broader effort to undermine the nation.

item.title: Trump delivers blunt assessment of Democratic Party's failure to address internal communist threat
Warren urges Trump to sign stalled bipartisan housing bill
item.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren calls Trump a 'man-child' throwing a 'tantrum' for refusing to sign the bipartisan 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act.

item.title: Trump asks Supreme Court to reinstate ICE no-bail policy
item.description: The Trump administration asked the Supreme Court on Friday to allow federal authorities to detain illegal aliens arrested in the U.S. interior without bail.
